G4183.kjv_def: abundant, + altogether, common, + far (passed, spent), (+ be of a) great (age, deal, -ly, while), long, many, much, oft(-en (-times)), plenteous, sore, straitly

G4602.derivation: apparently from (to hiss, i.e. hist or hush);

G1812.derivation: plural ordinal from G1803 (ἕξ) and G1540 (ἑκατόν);

G3849.derivation: from G3844 (παρά) and the middle voice of G971 (βιάζω);
G3849.strongs_def: to force contrary to (nature), i.e. compel (by entreaty)

G3710.strongs_def: to provoke or enrage, i.e. (passively) become exasperated

G4122.strongs_def: to be covetous, i.e. (by implication) to over-reach

G5025.derivation: dative case and accusative case feminine plural respectively of G3778 (οὗτος);

G5072.derivation: neuter of a compound of G5064 (τέσσαρες) and G3376 (μήν);

G0986.derivation: perhaps the same as the base of G985 (βλαστάνω);
G0986.strongs_def: Blastus, an officer of Herod Agrippa

G5008.strongs_def: the fresh, i.e. young girl; talitha (O maiden)

G5137.derivation: probably from G5143 (τρέχω) (through the idea of mobility);

G4755.derivation: from the base of G4756 (στρατιά) and G71 (ἄγω) or G2233 (ἡγέομαι);

G3036.derivation: from a compound of G3037 (λίθος) and G906 (βάλλω);

G2651.derivation: from G2596 (κατά) and accusative case plural feminine of G3441 (μόνος) (with G5561 (χώρα) implied);

G0096.derivation: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G1384 (δόκιμος);

G4763.derivation: from a presumed derivative of G4764 (στρῆνος);

G5052.derivation: from a compound of G5056 (τέλος) and G5342 (φέρω);

G4441.strongs_def: to question, i.e. ascertain by inquiry (as a matter of information merely; and thus differing from G2065 (ἐρωτάω), which properly means a request as a favor; and from G154 (αἰτέω), which is strictly a demand for something due; as well as from G2212 (ζητέω), which implies a search for something hidden; and from G1189 (δέομαι), which involves the idea of urgent need); by implication, to learn (by casual intelligence)

G4445.strongs_def: to be on fire, i.e. (specially), to have a fever

G0306.derivation: middle voice from G303 (ἀνά) and G906 (βάλλω);

G1383.derivation: neuter of a presumed derivative of G1382 (δοκιμή);

G0430.derivation: middle voice from G303 (ἀνά) and G2192 (ἔχω);

G0370.derivation: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G514 (ἄξιος);

G5353.strongs_def: utterance, i.e. a musical note (vocal or instrumental)

G5070.derivation: from the multiplicative adverb of G5064 (τέσσαρες) and G5507 (χίλιοι);

G0489.derivation: from a compound of G473 (ἀντί) and G3408 (μισθός);
